component.name: Tumbleweed Updater
component.summary: KDE-native system update orchestrator for openSUSE Tumbleweed

description.p: Tumbleweed Updater is a KDE-native system update orchestrator for openSUSE Tumbleweed. It provides a simple, policy-driven way to keep a Tumbleweed system up to date using the recommended zypper dup workflow — without exposing package management complexity.

ul.li: One-click system updates via zypper dup
Live streaming output during update apply
System tray integration with status badge (Wayland-compatible)
Automatic background update checks via systemd user timer
Reboot detection after kernel and core library updates
Snapper pre/post snapshot integration for safe rollback
Persistent update history log with rollback actions
Vendor change detection and policy control

description.p: Tumbleweed Updater is not a package manager. It does not support package search, installation, or removal. Its sole purpose is keeping a Tumbleweed system current, safely and reliably.

screenshot.caption: Update history log with rollback actions

ul.li: System update orchestration via zypper dup
Systemd user timer for background checks
Vendor change detection and policy control
Update history log with rollback support
